title: Unigloves Black Pearl Nitrile Examination Gloves - Multipurpose, Powder Free and Latex Free Disposable Gloves - Box of 100 Gloves, Black, Medium (GP0033)
features: RESISTANT TO A WIDE RANGE OF CHEMICALS: Providing robust protection and ensuring that users are protected from harmful substances during use. Latex free nitrile with a chlorinated finish for easy wear and comfort; powder free to stop hands from drying out and designed for use in dentistry, healthcare, tattoo/piercing and gardening

FOOD, CLEANING, AND HEALTHCARE ENVIRONMENTS: These medical grade gloves are made from nitrile which is latex free, plus the nitrile formulation conforms to the hand during use for a more comfortable fit, providing smooth, hygienic handling

SUITABLE FOR CONTACT WITH ALL FOOD TYPES: The beaded cuff on this multipurpose glove provides extra strength and helps prevent liquid roll back whilst the medium weight construction is suitable for contact with food and chemical resistant

TOUCHSCREEN: Textured palms and fingertips provide improved grip, particularly in wet or oily conditions and touchscreen compatibility allows you to use mobile and tablet displays without removing the gloves
INCLUDES: 1 x box of 100 Unigloves Black Pearl GP0033 examination gloves, food safe, chemical resistant, powder free, chlorinated AQL 1.5, size M, in black
